name: argus
description: Argus — the all-seeing monitor for your Claude Code agents, jobs, history and results.

scripts.build: npm -w web run build && npm -w server run build
scripts.test: npm -w server run test && npm -w web run test
scripts.typecheck: npm -w server run typecheck && npm -w web run typecheck
scripts.lint: npm -w server run lint && npm -w web run lint
scripts.check: npm run typecheck && npm run lint && npm run test
